sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59737" key="kratogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾱτο-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n59737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">head-born</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεός</foreign>, of Athena, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg004:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Antr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
